2605.22791.title: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
2605.22791.paper_summary: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) sharpens forgetting with channel-wise decay. But the active edit still uses a single scalar gate to control two different things: how much old content to erase on the key side and how much new content to commit on the value side. We introduce Gated DeltaNet-2, which generalizes both Gated DeltaNet and KDA by inheriting adaptive forgetting and channel-wise decay while addressing their shared limitation, the scalar tie between erasing and writing. Gated Delta Rule-2 separates these roles with a channel-wise erase gate b_t and a channel-wise write gate w_t, reducing to KDA when both gates collapse to the same scalar and to Gated DeltaNet when the decay also collapses. We derive a fast-weight update view, a chunkwise WY algorithm with channel-wise decay absorbed into asymmetric erase factors, and a gate-aware backward pass that preserves efficient parallel training. At 1.3B parameters trained on 100B FineWeb-Edu tokens, Gated DeltaNet-2 achieves the strongest overall results among Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 variants across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, and retrieval. Its advantage is most pronounced on long-context RULER needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks, where it improves the evaluated multi-key retrieval setting and remains strong in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2.
2605.22791.paper_summary_zh: 線性注意力用固定大小的遞迴狀態取代了軟最大注意力的無界快取，將序列混合降低至線性時間，解碼則減少至常數記憶體。困難的部分不僅在於忘記什麼，還在於如何編輯這個壓縮的記憶體而不打亂現有的聯繫。德爾塔規則模型在寫入新值之前會減去當前的讀取，而 Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) 則通過通道衰減來加強遺忘。但主動編輯仍然使用單一的標量閘來控制兩個不同的事物：在鍵側要抹去多少舊內容，以及在值側要提交多少新內容。我們引入了 Gated DeltaNet-2，它通過繼承自適應遺忘和通道衰減來概括 Gated DeltaNet 和 KDA，同時解決它們的共同限制，即抹去和寫入之間的標量綁定。Gated Delta Rule-2 用通道級抹除閘 b_t 和通道級寫入閘 w_t 分開這些角色，當兩個閘都收斂為相同的標量時，減少為 KDA，而當衰減也收斂時則減少為 Gated DeltaNet。我們推導出一個快速權重更新視圖，一個將通道衰減吸收到非對稱抹除因子的塊狀 WY 算法，以及一個保留高效並行訓練的閘感知反向傳播。在 1.3B 參數上，訓練於 100B FineWeb-Edu 令牌，Gated DeltaNet-2 在 Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA 和 Mamba-3 變體中，在語言建模、常識推理和檢索方面取得了最強的整體結果。它的優勢在長上下文 RULER 大海撈針基準上最為明顯，在這裡它改善了評估的多鍵檢索設置，並在遞迴和混合設置中保持強勁。代碼可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2 獲得。
2605.22791.author: Ali Hatamizadeh et.al.
2605.22791.authors: Ali Hatamizadeh, Yejin Choi, Jan Kautz
